📊 Excel Quote Template

Download the Twocan Africa quote template, fill it in Excel, then upload it here to generate a branded PDF quote automatically.

① Download Template

Opens a pre-formatted Excel sheet with the Twocan Africa header. Just fill in the yellow cells — description, qty, price — and save.

② Upload Completed Template

After filling in the Excel template, upload it here. The system will read it and prepare a branded Twocan PDF quote ready to print or save.

📋 Preview — Read from Excel

    Add Income / Expense

    📥 Import Income & Expense Records
    Required columns: Date, Type (income/expense), Category, Description, Amount  |  Optional: Reference
    DateTypeCategoryDescriptionReferenceAmount (KES)Actions
    Loading…
    🧾 Upload your invoices and quotes (PDF or image). Stored and linked to the client.
    📤 Upload Invoice / Quote
    NumberTypeClientDateDueAmount (KES)StatusFileActions
    Loading…

    Add Account Payable (Money We Owe)

    💡 Where it goes: Added to Payables ledger → automatically posts to Income & Expenses as an expense → feeds P&L, Cash Flow and Balance Sheet. When you click 💸 Pay it posts again as a cash-out.

    📄 Read Supplier Invoice / Bill

    Select the supplier, upload their invoice — the system reads it and links it to their account in the Supplier SOA.

    This will appear in their Supplier SOA
    📋 READ FROM FILE — CONFIRM & SAVE
    KES 0
    SupplierRef / InvoiceDescriptionCategoryInvoice (KES)Paid (KES)Balance (KES)Due DateStatusActions
    Loading…

    Add Account Receivable (Money Owed To Us)

    💡 Where it goes: Added to Receivables ledger → posts to Income & Expenses as pending income → shows in Client SOA balance → feeds P&L, Cash Flow and Balance Sheet. When you click ✅ Received it confirms the cash.

    📄 Read Our Invoice / Quote

    Select the client, upload the invoice — the system reads it and links it directly to their Client SOA.

    This will appear in their Client SOA
    📋 READ FROM INVOICE — CONFIRM & SAVE
    KES 0
    ClientRef / InvoiceDescriptionCategoryInvoice (KES)Paid (KES)Balance (KES)Due DateStatusActions

    📅 Select a date range above and click Load to view this client's statement
    💰 Record Payment Received from Client
    Amount received → posted to Total Income and deducted from this client's outstanding balance.
    🏭 Supplier Statements of Account
    Filter by date: to
    📅 Select a date range above and click Load to view this supplier's statement
    💸 Record Payment Made to Supplier
    Amount paid → posted to Expenses and deducted from Total Income (Net Profit).

    Every receivable and payable appears here immediately — unpaid or paid. Click any client/supplier name to filter to their records.

    Edit Record

    1 · Sales Details
    2 · Radio Details
    3 · Review & Submit

    ➕ New Purchase — Step 1: Sales Details

    Step 2: Radio Serial Numbers

    Enter the serial number for each radio. These become the unique tickets in the system.

    Step 3: Review & Submit

    This will create the order and send it to Technical for programming, then to Finance for invoicing.
    ✅ Sales

    ✅ Approve & Enter Serial Numbers
